title: Black Friday Deals
excerpt: Black Friday sale at Silhouette America (enter promo code: TANGERINE at check out) 1 Silhouette CAMEO® plus 1 copy of Silhouette Studio® Designer Edition (MSRP $349.98) for $229.99 1 Silhouette Portrait™ for $179.99 40 percent off at silhouetteamerica.com (Offer only…
body:
Black Friday sale at Silhouette America (enter promo code: TANGERINE at check out)

  • 1 Silhouette CAMEO® plus 1 copy of Silhouette Studio® Designer Edition (MSRP $349.98) for $229.99

  • 1 Silhouette Portrait™ for $179.99

  • 40 percent off at silhouetteamerica.com (Offer only valid at silhouetteamerica.com. Expires November 30, 2012. Rain checks not available. % discount excludes Silhouette CAMEO®, Silhouette Portrait™, downloads, download cards, subscriptions, and gift cards.)

THE WINNER OF THE SILHOUETTE CAMEO GIVEAWAY from this post is #225:

Eden Petersen says: November 21, 2012 at 4:57 pm (Edit)

I’m thankful for my faith, my family, and my job!! And I’m thankful for creativity and hope to win so I can express it with a Cameo!!

CONGRATS! And thanks everyone who entered- loved reading all your comments about what you're thankful for.

There's a huge 40% off sale going on at Two Peas In A Bucket right now - you can stock up on Sn@p! binders for $10.19 (instead of $16.99) and a whole bunch more. This grey airmail wide washi is just $3.60. Offer ends 11/26.Also noticed that my exclusive Favorites kit is 50% off!

It is time for the ModCloth 'Tis The Season Sale today through 11/25 with huge savings! The ModCloth 'Tis The Season Sale is an amazing sale including 100s of brand new stunning styles at 50% off! Now is the time to stock up on great styles for the holidays and beyond!
